posts.author: rania.nhrp (Rania Harahap)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone, I came accross the topic in this discussion where it discussed about how to set up a formula. I found this is very helpful. But I don’t know how to set it up. I tried to copy pasted the formula but it didn’t work. I’m not really familiar to this kinds of thing.

Could anyone please guide me?
Also you can reach out to me in LinkedIn Rania Nuriah Harahap. Thanks in advance!

#overduetaskreport #overdue formula

posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Rania!

Would you be happy to share a screenshot of the formula you used and the columns involved so we can see where it might be going wrong?
